rag_rules: Insert AGREE annex blocks into component implementations only when the contract involves visible features or constants from the target scope.
generic_rules: Place assume/guarantee contracts inside annex agree only when they reference visible identifiers or concrete bounds.
Use `assign` statements to link output features to computed values within AGREE annex blocks.
Avoid encoding AADL properties (e.g., Deadline, Period) as AGREE variables unless explicitly exposed as typed ports or constants.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annex blocks must use `assume`, `guarantee`, `eq`, `const`, and `assign` with valid AADL feature and type names.
anti_patterns: Do not insert AGREE annex blocks that reference AADL properties as variables without explicit model exposure.
